summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed or safe from this job. Each PR remains open pending the exact maintainer, author-followup, review, or green-check decision noted per item.

actions.reason: Maintainer technical review is required before any merge path; this inventory job cannot merge or repair the PR.

This broad user-facing i18n feature needs maintainer product and technical review; the job does not allow merge or fix actions.
An actionable review/change decision remains before merge; this job cannot repair or merge the branch and should not close it.
The Telegram message-delivery fix has unresolved review/author-followup readiness and cannot be merged or repaired by this inventory job.
